_meta.purpose: Runtime configuration for the Hatfield & McCoy DTF prototype. Non-secret values only — webhook proxy endpoint hides the real Discord URL.

kicksy.comment: Replace KICKSY_URL_PENDING with the actual Kicksy embed URL before ship. If fallback_mode is 'quote_form', the #builder section renders a custom quote form instead of the iframe.

webhook.comment: Form posts here. Vercel Edge Function at /api/intake.js proxies to Discord. Never expose the real webhook URL to the client bundle.

socials.comment: Decision P-03: All nulls — social icons hidden in footer until handles are confirmed with client.

site.comment: Set preview_flag_enabled=true via URL param ?preview=true on any page to show the .proto-flag watermark.

cart.comment: localStorage-backed cart. Stream A owns cart.js; swap to Shopify Cart API at launch. Same drawer UI.

intake.comment: Form progress ceiling matches Q1..Q12. localStorage draft restore. 15s cooldown between submissions (anti-spam).
